name: TaxBot
description: Tax filing assistant: crawls documents and Gmail for tax data, generates Form 1040, finds CPAs with pricing, sends SMS report.

twilioAccountSid.description: Twilio Account SID for SMS delivery

twilioFromNumber.description: Twilio phone number to send from (E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234)

recipientPhone.description: Your phone number to receive the report (E.164 format)

telegramBotToken.description: Telegram Bot API token from @BotFather (alternative to Twilio SMS)

telegramChatId.description: Telegram chat ID to send reports to (run getUpdates after messaging your bot to find it)

gmailCredentialsPath.description: Path to Google OAuth2 credentials.json from Google Cloud Console

gmailTokenPath.description: Path where Gmail OAuth token will be cached

taxDocumentsFolder.description: Default local folder to scan for tax documents

userLocation.description: City, State for CPA search (e.g. 'Seattle, WA')
